title: Decision Frontmatter Schema
description: Machine-readable traceability metadata for a RuneContext decision markdown file. Schema version 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Unknown versions must fail closed.

id.description: Stable decision identifier. Must match the path-relative stem under `decisions/` without the `.md` extension.

originating_changes.description: Change IDs that originally promoted this decision into durable project knowledge.

related_changes.description: Later change IDs that materially relate to, rely on, or revisit the decision.
